dataFlows.transformKql: source | extend Insights = parse_json(todynamic(Insights)) | extend TimeGenerated = iff(isempty(todatetime(Insights.TimeGenerated)), now(), todatetime(Insights.TimeGenerated)) | project TimeGenerated, Name = tostring(Insights.Name), SrcResId = tostring(ResourceId), SrcIP = tostring(Insights.SrcIP), DestResId = tostring(Insights.DestResourceId), DestIP = tostring(Insights.DestIP), ResourceInternalId = tostring(ResourceInternalId), IllumioTenantId = tostring(IllumioTenantId), ResourceTenantId = tostring(ResourceTenantId), IllumioUrl = tostring(IllumioUrl), Service = tostring(Insights.Service), Port = toint(Insights.Port), Proto = tostring(Insights.Proto), SrcLabel = tostring(Insights.SrcLabel), DestLabel = tostring(Insights.DestLabel), TotalSentBytes = tolong(Insights.TotalSentBytes), TotalReceivedBytes = tolong(Insights.TotalReceivedBytes), SrcThreatLevel = toint(Insights.SrcThreatLevel), SrcCity = tostring(Insights.SrcCity), SrcRegion = tostring(Insights.SrcRegion), SrcCountry = tostring(Insights.SrcCountry), DestThreatLevel = toint(Insights.DestThreatLevel), DestCity = tostring(Insights.DestCity), DestRegion = tostring(Insights.DestRegion), DestCountry = tostring(Insights.DestCountry), SrcVnetId = tostring(Insights.SrcVnetId), DestVnetId = tostring(Insights.DestVnetId), SrcPort = toint(Insights.SrcPort), DestPort = toint(Insights.DestPort), SrcIsWellKnown = tobool(Insights.SrcIsWellKnown), DestIsWellKnown = tobool(Insights.DestIsWellKnown), FlowCount = tolong(Insights.FlowCount), UniqueId = tostring(Insights.UniqueId), Status = tostring(Insights.Status), SourceSystem = 'IllumioInsights'
